message:
fix(ci): drop x86_64-apple-darwin target and fix bench subquery

- Remove macos-15-intel build target: ort-sys lacks prebuilt ONNX
  Runtime binaries for x86_64-apple-darwin.  v0.2.20 never shipped
  this target.
- Fix seed_bench_database_populates_expected_fixture: replace IN
  (SELECT ...) subquery with simple COUNT — FrankenSQLite evaluates
  IN-subqueries incorrectly, returning 0 rows.

Bump to v0.2.26.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,8 +65,8 @@ jobs:
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
-          - os: macos-15-intel
-            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+          # x86_64-apple-darwin removed: ort-sys lacks prebuilt ONNX
+          # Runtime binaries for this target.  v0.2.20 never shipped it.
           - os: macos-14
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
           - os: windows-latest
